name: CitroTech Inc.
summary: CitroTech Inc. (CITR) is a development-stage company focused on wildfire protection products. The company develops fire retardant or suppression products intended to prevent wildfires or protect assets, seeking listing on the USFS Qualified Products List (QPL). CitroTech pursues contract services revenue, distribution agreements, joint ventures, and EPA-compliant manufacturing arrangements to commercialize its product offerings.
